prose: The HOMO–LUMO gap for aniline was computed as 5.30482 eV using density functional theory (DFT) with the B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set (density fitting enabled, default for PySCF). The simulation was performed in the gas phase with charge 0 and multiplicity 1. The coordinates were sourced from the file `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz`. The SCF process converged successfully after 9 cycles. The calculation reported no warnings. Additional orbital information includes: HOMO energy of -5.55377 eV, LUMO energy of -0.24895 eV, and several neighboring orbitals. Source files, including calculated orbitals, reside at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpvbhnhzxp/live.json`.
